scripts.db:push:prod: env $(grep -v '^#' .env.prod | xargs) bun node_modules/.bin/prisma db push --schema=./packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:prod: env $(grep -v '^#' .env.prod | xargs) bun node_modules/.bin/prisma migrate deploy --schema=./packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:baseline: mkdir -p packages/db/prisma/migrations/0_init && bun node_modules/.bin/prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma --script > packages/db/prisma/migrations/0_init/migration.sql && env $(grep -v '^#' .env.prod | xargs) bun node_modules/.bin/prisma migrate resolve --applied 0_init --schema=./packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.phala:env: phala deploy --cvm-id $(phala cvms list --json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.cvmName == "openkey-api") | .appId' | sed 's/^/app_/') -c docker-compose.prod.yml -e .env.prod
